name: Cajun Grilled Chops
recipeIngredient: 4 boneless pork center loin chops, 1 1/2 inches thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the seasonings in a small bowl and mix well.
2. Place the pork chops in the bowl, coating them evenly with the seasoning mixture.
3. Grill over medium-high heat for 7-8 minutes per side, turning once halfway through the cooking time.
Cuisine:
Cajun
Source: National Pork Producers Council
